AddressEmptyCode(address).details: There's no code at `target` (it is not a contract).

AddressInsufficientBalance(address).details: The ETH balance of the account is not enough to perform the operation.

FailedInnerCall().details: A call to an address target failed. The target may have reverted.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC20 token failed.

params.maxCLAWD: Maximum CLAWD willing to spend (slippage protection)

params.minCLAWDOut: Minimum CLAWD to receive from swap (slippage protection)
Minimum CLAWD to receive from swap (slippage protection)
params.usdcAmount: Amount of USDC to spend (6 decimals)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

quoteCredits(uint256).details: This is a convenience view — the actual amount charged uses      apiCredits.pricePerCredit() which is the static contract rate.      The TWAP price from CLAWDPricing is for frontend USD display.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

buyWithCLAWD(uint256[],uint256).notice: Buy credits by paying CLAWD directly.

buyWithETH(uint256[],uint256).notice: Buy credits by paying ETH. Swaps ETH → WETH → CLAWD via Uniswap.

buyWithUSDC(uint256[],uint256,uint256).notice: Buy credits by paying USDC. Swaps USDC → WETH → CLAWD via Uniswap.

quoteCredits(uint256).notice: Get the CLAWD amount needed for N credits (from TWAP oracle).

userdoc.notice: Payment router for ZK API Credits. Accepts CLAWD directly, ETH, or USDC. Non-CLAWD payments are swapped to CLAWD via Uniswap v3 before calling APICredits.stakeAndRegister(). Uses CLAWDPricing for TWAP-based price discovery.
